verifyCommand: npm run typecheck && cd python && pytest ../tests/python/ -v && cd ..
acceptanceCriteria: UI matches 通达信 reference screenshots

features.title: Phase 1.1: Tauri + React 项目初始化
acceptanceCriteria: npm create tauri-app with react-ts template
App builds and opens empty window
features.notes: Foundation task — everything depends on this

features.title: Phase 1.2: 黑底主题系统
acceptanceCriteria: CSS variables defined per CLAUDE.md spec (--bg-primary, --color-up, --color-down, etc.)

features.title: Phase 1.3: 主布局 MainLayout.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: TopNav 60px, K线区 55%, 成交量 20%, 指标 25%, InfoPanel 25% width, StatusBar 28px
Layout matches 通达信 reference proportions
Splitter between chart areas is draggable

features.title: Phase 1.4: K线主图 KLineChart.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: MA5 yellow, MA10 purple, MA20 green, MA60 white

features.title: Phase 1.5: 周期切换器 PeriodSelector.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: All periods available: min1/5/15/30/60, daily/weekly/monthly, quarterly/yearly

features.title: Phase 1.6: 成交量 + MACD
acceptanceCriteria: MACD(12,26,9): DIF white, DEA yellow, MACD histogram red/green
Three charts share timeScale, sync on scroll/zoom

features.title: Phase 1.7: 数据层 + Data Adapter
acceptanceCriteria: AKShareAdapter skeleton with real API call
features.notes: Data adapter 抽象层 — dev 用 mock, prod 切 AKShare/Tushare/通达信

features.title: Phase 1 Gate: E2E 验收测试
acceptanceCriteria: App launches showing real/mock K-line chart
Python backend starts and responds to API calls
features.notes: PHASE GATE: 必须全部通过才能进入 Phase 2

features.title: Phase 2.1: 十字光标 + 信息浮窗
acceptanceCriteria: Crosshair snaps to nearest K-line center
Arrow keys move one bar at a time
Vertical line spans all 3 chart areas
Horizontal line stays within current area
Y-axis price label (red bg) at crosshair
Info tooltip shows: symbol, time, OHLC, change%, volume, amount, turnover, amplitude
Red bg for tooltip, red/green coloring for values
features.notes: Completed in session: crosshair + tooltip + wheel zoom

features.title: Phase 2.2: 鼠标滚轮缩放
acceptanceCriteria: Scroll up = zoom in (fewer bars, more detail), centered on cursor
All 3 chart areas sync zoom on X-axis
features.notes: Completed in session: crosshair + tooltip + wheel zoom

features.title: Phase 2.3: 右侧空白 + 上方空白
acceptanceCriteria: Price scale manual range setting (坐标设置 dialog)
Settings persist to SQLite config table
features.notes: ChartSettingsDialog + PriceScaleDialog; chartSettingsStore; config API with SQLite; rightOffset tracked from timeScale drag

features.title: Phase 2.4: 右侧信息面板 InfoPanel
acceptanceCriteria: MarketSummary: latest price, open, prev close, change%, volume, turnover
TickList: time|price|volume scrolling list with red/green
features.notes: InfoPanel.tsx: MarketSummary from last candle, TickList from recent 30 bars (newest first), 12 sector quick links, collapse/expand toggle button

features.title: Phase 2 Gate: 交互验收测试
acceptanceCriteria: Crosshair works smoothly with mouse and keyboard
Zoom in/out works with scroll wheel
Right blank and top blank adjustable
Info panel displays all required fields
features.notes: PHASE GATE: 必须全部通过才能进入 Phase 3

features.title: Phase 3.1: 画线引擎架构
acceptanceCriteria: Canvas overlay layer on top of Lightweight Charts
Drawings stored as price-time coordinates (not pixels)
Drawing works in future blank area and top blank area

features.title: Phase 3.2: 画线工具栏 DrawingToolbar
acceptanceCriteria: Floating panel with grid layout (6-8 columns)
All tool types available with icons + tooltips

features.title: Phase 3.3: 各工具实现 (20+ tools)
acceptanceCriteria: All tools work in future blank + top blank areas

features.title: Phase 3.4: 画线持久化
acceptanceCriteria: Drawings auto-save to SQLite drawings table
Single delete and clear all work

features.title: Phase 3 Gate: 画线 CRUD 验收测试
acceptanceCriteria: Drawings display at correct positions on zoom/scroll
Delete single and clear all work
Drawing in future blank area works
No coordinate drift on different data ranges
features.notes: PHASE GATE: 必须全部通过才能进入 Phase 4

features.title: Phase 4.1: 指标计算引擎 (20+ indicators)
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend tab bar switches between indicators
Indicator values match pandas-ta reference output

features.title: Phase 4.2: 区间统计弹窗
acceptanceCriteria: Left column: price/K-line stats (all fields from spec)
Right column: capital flow + volatility stats

features.title: Phase 4.3: 自定义公式引擎
acceptanceCriteria: lark parser handles 通达信-compatible formula syntax
Results overlay on main chart or sub chart

features.title: Phase 4 Gate: 指标计算验收测试
acceptanceCriteria: All 22 indicators compute and display correctly
Indicator values verified against known test data
Formula engine parses and evaluates test formulas
No Python backend errors under normal use
features.notes: PHASE GATE: 必须全部通过才能进入 Phase 5

features.title: Phase 5.1: 选股筛选器 StockScreener
acceptanceCriteria: Condition builder UI: field selector + operator + value
Click row jumps to K-line chart

features.title: Phase 5.2: 板块热力图 SectorHeatmap
acceptanceCriteria: Color: red (涨) to green (跌) gradient
Click sector expands to show stocks
Click stock jumps to K-line chart

features.title: Phase 5.3: 资金流向分析
acceptanceCriteria: Top: daily capital flow overview (main force vs retail)
Bottom: historical capital flow trend chart
Each shows: buy / sell / net volume / net amount

features.title: Phase 5.4: 数据导入管理 DataSourceSettings
acceptanceCriteria: 通达信 directory picker for local file import
Manual import: drag-drop CSV/XLSX + 通达信 format auto-detect

features.title: Phase 5 Gate: 选股/数据管理验收测试
acceptanceCriteria: Heatmap renders with correct colors and proportions
Data import from CSV and 通达信 files works
API data source connection and sync works
features.notes: PHASE GATE: 必须全部通过才能进入 Phase 6

features.title: Phase 6.1: 回测引擎 backtest_engine.py
acceptanceCriteria: BacktestEngine class with formula-based buy/sell conditions
Outputs: totalReturn, maxDrawdown, winRate, profitFactor, sharpe, tradeCount, avgHoldDays

features.title: Phase 6.2: 回测可视化 BacktestResult
acceptanceCriteria: K-line with buy (red up arrow) and sell (green down arrow) markers

features.title: Phase 6.3: 快捷键系统
acceptanceCriteria: Arrow keys: left/right move crosshair, up/down switch stock

features.title: Phase 6.4: Tauri 打包发布
acceptanceCriteria: PyInstaller bundles python/ to single executable
tauri.conf.json externalBin configured for python-backend sidecar
npm run tauri build produces MSI/EXE installer on Windows
Installer works on clean Windows machine (no Python/Node required)
App launches and all features work from installed version
features.notes: 用户是老人，必须双击安装即可使用

features.title: Phase 6.5: 性能优化
acceptanceCriteria: First screen: show latest 100 bars, lazy load rest

features.title: Phase 6 Gate: 最终验收测试 + 安装包测试
acceptanceCriteria: App starts without errors on fresh install
Performance: <2s first load, smooth scroll at 5000+ bars
features.notes: FINAL GATE: 最终发布前必须全部通过
